subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-09-01 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The people are sorely afflicted, for their sons have been taken into military service. When they hear the verses from above [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهالی خیلی در صدمه هستند زیرا همه اولادهایشان را به سربازی برده اند.  چون صدای اشعار [را] از بالا بشنوند
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
